operational_knowledge_units.title: ActiveExchangeModel stores active chute exchange records
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that when a chute is closed, an active exchange record is created in the ActiveExchangeModel.
observed_evidence: Slide text: 'When a chute is closed an active exchange is created in the ActiveExchangeModel.'

relationships.details: A chute closure causes creation of an active exchange record.

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Sorter Sweeper Database Exchange ActiveExchangeModel when a chute is closed an active exchange is created in the ActiveExchangeModel.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Exchange closes and is archived when an empty tote replaces the closed chute
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide describes that when an empty tote replaces a closed chute, the exchange is closed and archived in Exchange activity.
observed_evidence: Slide text: 'When a empty tote replaces it, the exchange is closed and archived in Exchange activity'

relationships.details: A previously active exchange is archived after closure.
Replacement with an empty tote closes the exchange.

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: When an empty tote replaces a closed chute, the exchange is closed and archived in Exchange activity. Sorter Sweeper Database exchange behavior.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Exchange lifecycle transitions from active to archived
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide implies an exchange lifecycle where chute closure creates an active exchange, and empty tote replacement closes that exchange and archives it in Exchange activity.
observed_evidence: Slide text: 'When a chute is closed an active exchange is created in the ActiveExchangeModel.'
Slide text: 'When a empty tote replaces it, the exchange is closed and archived in Exchange activity'

relationships.details: Created as active in ActiveExchangeModel after chute closure, then closed and archived in Exchange activity after empty tote replacement.

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Exchange lifecycle in Sorter Sweeper Database: chute closed creates active exchange in ActiveExchangeModel; empty tote replacement closes and archives exchange in Exchange activity.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Exchange record lifecycle during chute closure and tote replacement
preconditions: An exchange record is relevant to sorter sweeper operation
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide text describes exchange creation when a chute closes and exchange closure/archive when an empty tote replaces it.

steps.expected_outcome: An active exchange is created in the ActiveExchangeModel.
steps.validation_check: Confirm that an active exchange record exists in ActiveExchangeModel.

steps.instruction: Replace the closed chute position with an empty tote.
steps.expected_outcome: The exchange is closed and archived in Exchange activity.
steps.validation_check: Confirm the exchange no longer remains active and appears in Exchange activity.

warnings: The slide describes system behavior but does not provide full operational prerequisites, interface details, or user actions beyond the stated sequence.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Procedure candidate for exchange lifecycle: close chute to create active exchange in ActiveExchangeModel, then replace with empty tote to close and archive exchange in Exchange activity.
